text:
Mitsuba (ミツバ, Mitsuba) was a female servant of the Zoldyck Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 322 

Appearance

Mitsuba was a young woman with blonde hair and freckles. She wore the standard Zoldyck butler uniform. 

Personality

She was a cheery woman, who listened to the orders given to her. It was likely she really cared for Alluka, as seen when she became upset and began tearing up when she was forced to refuse all of her requests. 

Background

Mitsuba was a butler for the Zoldyck family, before she was crushed to death, after denying four of Alluka's requests. 

Plot

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Mitsuba is seen in a flashback regarding Alluka. In the flashback, Mitsuba unintentionally becomes the first person (other than Killua) who witnesses Alluka entering her wish-granting mode after she fulfills three consecutive requests made by Alluka. Kikyo later orders Mitsuba to decline any request made by Alluka to test the unknown ability. Obeying the order, she refuses Alluka's requests four times in a row, and as a result, she is crushed to death together with her lover Hassam, another butler of the Zoldyck family, by the unknown and yet-to-be-understood power that resides in Alluka. 

Abilities & Powers

As a butler of the Zoldyck Family, Mitsuba was in constant training. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 40 She could also open the Testing Gates, since according to Zebro, opening the gates is the bare minimum, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 although the number of doors she could open is unknown.

Nen

Mitsuba also likely knew how to use Nen since Canary, an apprentice butler, was a Nen user.
